title: Travel Cost Tool
description: Create a new tool for visualizing travel costs between cities. Click on city A, then city B to show the cost of traveling between them. Factor in distance, road quality, and terrain type. Display breakdown of cost components. Show estimated time for the journey.
definition-of-done: Tool selectable from tool menu. Click flow for selecting cities works. Cost calculation includes all factors. Breakdown displayed clearly. Time estimate shown.
testing-plan: Test tool selection. Verify city click detection. Confirm cost calculation accuracy. Test various route combinations.
todos: Calculate travel cost with all factors
